name: Rahul M.
story: Three weeks in and my anxiety before work just lifted completely. I was sceptical at first but the results were undeniable.

name: Sarah K.
story: Chamomile tea every night for a month. I went from 5 hours broken sleep to 7 hours solid. Simple but incredibly powerful.

name: James T.
story: Turmeric golden milk every morning. My joint pain from years of running has reduced significantly in just 6 weeks.

name: Meera P.
story: Tulsi tea during flu season. I was the only one in my office who did not get sick this entire winter.

name: David O.
story: Moringa powder in my morning smoothie for energy. I stopped needing three coffees a day. Truly life changing.

name: Ananya R.
story: Ginger and peppermint tea helped my IBS more than anything the doctor prescribed. Natural really is powerful.
